Flow.description: MIS-7638 Cycle Price flow fault MIS-7524 Remove Finalize screen from the cycle price flow MIS-6998 Opportunity MEDDPICC Next Stage Process > assign output VAR + Added Validation (MIS-1368) + Adjusted Original Renewal Amount calculation logic + Added ROUND on Cycle Price & Original Renewal Amount calculation
Flow.label: Update Cycle Price / Currency

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError_0_0
fields.fieldText: Cycle price cannot be 0 if Type is not 'Feature Update' or probability is equal or greater than 25%

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Cycle price cannot be 0 if Type is not 'Feature Update' or probability is equal or greater than 25%

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Cycle price cannot be 0 if Type is not 'Feature Update' or probability is equal or greater than 25%

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError_0_0_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: Cycle price cannot be 0 if Type is not 'Feature Update' or probability is equal or greater than 25%

fields.name: Current_Cycle_Price
fields.fieldText: ﻿Current Cycle Price ($) - {!Get_Opp_Details.Cycle_Price__c}

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError
fields.fieldText: The ARR cannot be higher than the original renewal amount. Please create an upsell opportunity to reflect an increase in ARR

fields.name: Renewal_Cycle_Price_ValidationError_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText: The ARR cannot be higher than the original renewal amount. Please create an upsell opportunity to reflect an increase in ARR
